chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.83 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.1121/2025 3. For hearing of main case 09.02.2026 Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, Advocate for the applicant Under instructions, this reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
